title: Verify bounded correction feedback
preconditions: Accepted, rejected, corrected, historical, missing-evidence, and feedback-derived candidate examples are available.
steps: Record each decision; derive proposals; attempt automatic activation and broadening; validate and explicitly activate a safe successor; inspect old feedback after retirement.
expected: FR-CLASSIFY-CORRECTION-FEEDBACK holds: feedback remains attributable, one correction never generalizes or activates a rule, and missing evidence produces no reconstructed proposal.
